productName: 5 Year Fixed Home Loan Investment Interest Only

detail.name: 5 Year Fixed Home Loan Investment Interest Only
detail.description: Our fixed rate home loans provide security of fixed repayments and allows for additional repayments up to $10,000 per annum.

features.additionalInfo: extra repayments of up to $10,000 are allowed on a fixed rate

fees.name: Valuation Fee
fees.additionalInfo: The cost of the first valuation for a new security is covered by RACQ Bank. Any additional valuation required on an existing security will be payable by the member at cost.

fees.name: Company / Trust - Borrower / Guarantor Party Fee Company Search and Review Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for each company or trust borrower / guarantor party on the loan.

fees.name: Early Payment Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable if you make extra repayments that exceed $10,000 per annum during any fixed period. Applicable to fixed term loans only. Interest differential as defined in the loan contract is payable.

fees.name: Default Enforcement Expenses
fees.additionalInfo: May apply if enforcement services are required as part of default administration.

fees.name: Discharge Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for standard partial or full discharges.

fees.name: Loan Document Fee - Top Up
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for a further advance against existing security. Valuation fee at cost.

fees.name: Early Termination Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable if you repay your loan or change to a variable interest rate during the fixed rate period. Applicable to fixed term loans only. Interest differential as defined in the loan contract plus a $200 administration fee.

fees.name: Home Loan Fixed Rate Lock Fee
fees.additionalInfo: If you elect to lock your fixed interest rate for a period of 90 days from the date you return your Home Loan Fixed Rate Lock Request. Available for new lending applications only.

fees.name: Document Preparation and Settlement Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Document Preparation and Settlement Fee includes the cost of title search, document preparation and settlement fees - document generation, distribution of documents, verification of returned documents, verification of search requirements, settlement booking, settlement attendance (PEXA or paper) and lodgement of title documents.

lendingRates.additionalInfo: Interest only term is available for up to 5 years
